changelog: Major tool-completeness + hardening release. Every tool now covers the full operation set of its Revit API class: editable levels/grids/types (rename/delete), real associative arrays and beam systems, floor/region openings, curved (arc) walls and beams, compound-structure wrapping, view-template/filter purge, cross-document copy, multi-rule view filters, material asset assignment, unit-aware parameter writes (e.g. ''3000 mm''), OR/NOT/level element filters, multi-condition parameter filtering, true solid-geometry clash detection, and write tools for worksets and project info. lines_per_view_count now has a cooperative time budget to avoid timeouts on view-heavy models. New: full Command Catalog (docs/COMMANDS.md) listing all 175 commands with natural-language prompt examples.
